acquisition method: Data dependent scans (Top 20) were employed to automatically isolate and generate fragment ions by higher energy collisional dissociation (HCD).
collision energy: Normalised collision energy (NCE): 25%) in the HCD collision cell and measurement of the resulting fragment ions was performed in the Orbitrap analyser, set at a resolution of 17 500.
instrument: a Dionex Ultimate 3000 RSLC nanoUPLC (Thermo Fisher Scientific) system and a Q Exactive Orbitrap mass spectrometer (Thermo Fisher Scientific).
ionization type: The LC eluant was sprayed into the mass spectrometer by means of an Easy-spray source (Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc.).
labeling: visualise unambiguously 73 out of the 91 rRNA modifications of the human 40S ribosomal subunit identified by SILNAS-based quantification.
reduction reagent: 2 mM DTT, 0.5 mM EDTA, supplemented with 0.5 mM NaF, 0.1 mM Na3VO4, 0.5× protein inhibitors cocktail tablet (Roche), 2000 units of RNasin Plus ribonuclease inhibitor (Promega), 0.5 mg/mL heparin and 0.5% Igepal-630 (Sigma)).
reduction concentration: 30 mM HEPES–KOH pH 7.5, 50 mM KCl, 10 mM MgCl2, 220 mM sucrose, 2 mM DTT...
